title: ollama/ollama
summary: Get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama. Chat with local LLMs from any Python script.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama. Works in Node, Bun, Deno and browsers.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration for Ollama models. Use any Ollama model as an LLM or chat component.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (renamed to Open WebUI). ChatGPT-style interface that works offline.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama. Simple fluent API to pull, create, and chat with models.

title: ollamajs (community)
summary: Lightweight community TypeScript wrapper with extra utilities like prompts and templates.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Official Ruby gem for Ollama. Idiomatic Ruby client with full model and chat support.

title: ollama-cli-csharp
summary: .NET/C# client for Ollama. Strongly-typed API with async enumerables for streaming.

title: ollama-gui-electrion
summary: Minimal cross-platform desktop GUI for Ollama built with Electron.

title: haystack-ollama
summary: Deepset Haystack 2.x integration to use Ollama models as generators or embedders.

title: ollama-copilots
summary: Turn any Ollama model into a GitHub Copilot-style code completer for VS Code.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support.

title: ollama-huggingface-hub
summary: Convert and push any Hugging Face model.gguf to Ollama’s model registry in one command.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Host your own Discord bot powered by local Ollama models. Slash commands and thread support.

title: ollama-rag-chatbot
summary: Simple retrieval-augmented generation example using Ollama, ChromaDB and LangChain.

title: ollama-dagger-module
summary: Dagger CI module to cache and serve Ollama models inside your pipelines.

title: ollama-macos-menu
summary: Native macOS menu-bar app for starting/stopping Ollama and switching models.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix package and NixOS module for Ollama with automatic GPU driver configuration.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate providing async bindings and strong types for the Ollama API.
